summary: The diff implements a comprehensive auto-chess game with ancient Egyptian theme. Most requirements are well-addressed, but some specific acceptance criteria have gaps: the main menu screen component is not visible in the diff, unit movement animation during combat appears limited to CSS transitions rather than actual pathfinding position updates, and the Egyptian panel border image is not used on panels. The diff is truncated so some components like MainMenu and App.tsx are not shown, creating uncertainty.

missing_requirements.requirement: Main menu screen with game title 'Pharaoh's Conquest' and Start Game button
missing_requirements.reason: No MainMenu.tsx or App.tsx is included in the diff. The HowToPlayModal component exists but the main menu screen itself cannot be confirmed from the visible diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Units visually move toward their targets during combat
missing_requirements.reason: UnitSprite uses CSS transitions on left/top position but combatEngine.ts does not show logic for updating unit grid positions toward enemies between attacks — no movement pathfinding is visible.

missing_requirements.requirement: Egyptian-themed visual effects: golden glow for Ra abilities, sand particle bursts for desert units, hieroglyph flash for magical spells
missing_requirements.reason: CSS has some glow utilities but no specific per-ability visual effects such as sand particles or hieroglyph flash animations tied to spell casting are visible in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Panel frames use the decorative Egyptian border image (egypt-panel-frame.dim_800x600.png)
missing_requirements.reason: EgyptianPanel uses CSS borders and gradients for decoration, not the generated egypt-panel-frame image asset.

missing_requirements.requirement: Pyramid silhouettes used as decorative elements throughout the interface
missing_requirements.reason: Egyptian iconography in the visible diff uses hieroglyphs and ankh-style symbols, but no pyramid silhouette decorations are shown in any component.

hallucinated_features.description: Two additional synergies beyond the required 4: 'Royal Bloodline' and 'Ancient Mystics' with their own thresholds and buffs
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 specifies at least 4 synergies. The diff implements 6 synergies. While extra synergies are not harmful, Royal Bloodline and Ancient Mystics were not explicitly requested.
The build request mentions a shop system but does not specify a refresh mechanic or its cost. The Shop.tsx implements a 2-gold refresh button.
